3.  **Refine segments:** I will group the teasers into a single "anchor_intro" block or keep them separate if they are distinct visual packages. The prompt asks for editorial packages. The teasers are visually distinct but part of the intro. I'll group the initial teasers with the anchor intro or treat them as part of the intro sequence. However, looking at the structure, the anchor speaks, then B-roll plays. I'll treat the anchor speaking as the intro and the B-roll as part of that intro sequence or separate graphics packages. Given the "editorial_package" types, "anchor_intro" fits best for the anchor speaking, and "graphics_package" for the B-roll montages.
